raw_consumer_statement: on XX/XX/year>XXXX  I reported a fraud charge of XXXX $ and asked it to be removed for over a year I paid them and they reopened the disputed fraud charge 4 more times and it did not go through so finally after 1 year I got so frustrated I stop paying them I keep asking them to provide info on that fraud charge not only they do not answer me but they keep charging me on a closed account I offered to go back to XX/XX/year>XXXX  balance and forget all that happened after XX/XX/year>XXXX  but they are not willing to negotiate, AMEX is hurting my financial well being by refusing to provide the info I requested thus I am filling this complaint for immediate removal of that fraud charge I think I owe them around XXXX they claim XXXX  which is FALSE
